description: A panoramic landscape-format painting depicting a May Day parade in Petrograd. A large crowd marches across an open field or park, carrying numerous red banners and flags. Trees line the background, with buildings and a spire visible beyond. The sky dominates the upper two-thirds of the composition with large billowing white clouds against a blue-purple expanse. Small figures and vehicles dot the foreground. The scene is rendered in loose, impressionistic brushwork with strong color contrasts between the red banners and the green landscape.

_meta.title: May Day parade. Petrograd. Mars Field
